description: Only personal GitHub repos (no contributions to others); moderate personal projects, no work.

basics.name: Candidate I
basics.summary: Hobbyist developer with a handful of personal repositories.

projects.name: blog-engine
projects.description: A small personal blog engine with markdown posts; no external contributors.

labels.rationale: Per the criteria, personal repositories alone do not constitute open-source contribution (open_source must stay <= 10). Projects are moderate at best and there is no work experience, so the total stays in the weak band despite an active GitHub presence.
